description: PRUnderground has been more than helpful as I've used their service over the last few years. I'm grateful that they are accommodating and mindful that I'm a small business owner.
author: Tammi L.
pros: PRUnderground allows me to provide my clients with an impressive option they might not normally have easy access to. Put it this way, it ups the impressiveness of my service to have PRUnderground for press release distribution thanks to their ability to tap Google for coverage. As a bonus, the site is easy to navigate and customer service is always on board to help.
cons: Topic restrictions are a bit stringent which can lessen incoming revenue. That said, I tend to agree with their topic restrictions and think it helps keeps the site clean overall.

review_title: If you know what you're doing, it's the best tool out there to distribute your clients' news!
description: My overall experience w/PRU has been sensational.
author: Rafe G.
pros: Fast. Easy. Intuitive. Inexpensive. Superb customer service.
cons: It would be great if the media outlets that are among the automatic pickups could be regionally selectable, depending upon the location of the client whose news is being distributed. Also, some bigger name national outlets would be nice to be included in the automatic pickups.

review_title: Great to get the word out
author: Jen N.
pros: It's an easy format to share press releases and ensure that several media organizations pick-up and share the story.
cons: Unsure if the media outlets are respected and if they are relevant to our industry. We've not seen much come from post-announcement.

description: Customer service is always super quick to respond when I've had issues or questions which I really appreciate. Overall, it is a great service for a great price point.
author: Brianna Z.
pros: Very easy to use with great customer service. Plus, the price is better than most other distribution tools on the market.
cons: There seem to be slightly more topic restrictions for releases which can be frustrating for clients.

review_title: Terrific PR Tool At An Even Better Price
description: Overall I would have to give PR Underground a near-perfect score. Their pricing is fair, their interface is manageable and their customer service is terrific.
author: Max J.
pros: We are a full-service digital marketing agency that has had issues with other press release distribution companies in the past. We switched over to PR underground a couple of years ago and have never looked back. The fair and straightforward pricing is incredibly hard to pass up, and their customer service is terrific. Also there, reporting is also beneficial to an agency like us as we can easily send that report to our clients and show them where their press releases being published.
cons: The backend of PR Underground can be a little bit confusing at times but it is way better than some of the other alternatives we have used in the past.

description: My experience has been great, response time and distribution is extremely efficient.
author: LaToya H.
pros: The reporting and clipping feature are my favorites. PR Undergeound also services press releases via Cison and provide real-time reports up to 30 days after the distribution.
cons: The product delivers exactly what it promises, expeditiously.

description: PR Underground are the best in their space.
author: James P.
pros: The price and reach. No competitors are as low priced and allow me to deliver as much value to my clients.
cons: No significant cons. I do wish the platform allowed crypto-related press releases, hopefully that is something they will consider in the future.

review_title: A great value and an intuitive UI
description: Overall, I am very pleased with the service.
author: Hugh T.
pros: I run a small PR firm. I use PR Underground when I need PR News Wire distribution. I have found the software to be an amazing value. They get you the distribution you need for a great price. It's infinitely easier than dealing directly with PR News Wire - they take the complexity out of that process. The interface is intuitive and easy to use, once you learn it.
cons: The process of distribution was a little difficult to learn at first. Now that I know how to do it, it's super easy.

author: Corina O.
pros: I like how easy it is to set up an account and submit a press release. Besides their syndication network, we got one of our releases picked up organically by an industry publication which was all that we wanted. Much cheaper than most other wire services out there.
cons: Not all releases are picked up organically, but I guess this happens with any wire service out there.

author: frank U.
pros: PRUNDERGROUND Have helped me to distribute press releases to news websites effectively
cons: It is costly and not all the medium or large businesses can be able to afford the prices.

author: Chancer R.
pros: Unlike other services that I have used, which were overpriced and ineffective, PR Underground has always helped me get the word out for clients, especially on Google News.
cons: User interface is a bit clunky but it gets the job done.

review_title: Great service and so much more reasonable than many of its competitors
description: Very favorable. We don't use it often, 3-4 times a year perhaps. It's easy to use. I just upload our press release, tweak it a bit and send it. Takes maybe 10 to 15 minutes to complete.
author: Ranny L.
pros: Easy to use, reasonable price, good customer service when I needed help. Reached the specific demographics I wanted to reach
cons: None to speak of. Perhaps it could allow us to include more links. I don't remember to tell you the truth.

description: Very positive experience each time both with set up and implementation, and customer service.
author: Brooks D.
pros: This software is a great value compared to others in the market
cons: The user interface is a bit outdated design wise; however, not a dealbreaker - it's fine

review_title: The most effective and economical form of promotion
description: We promote a series of food industry clients and to reach our audience we have been able to showcase their products with PR Underground. Return on our releases through PR have been higher than using our Eblast platforms.
author: mark N.
pros: The best part is that the reach is so much better than we can do on our own. The software is easy to use and very intuitive. We are able to accomplish our SEO goals and promotional goals in one shot!
cons: The sofware handles all our needs and SEO requirements

description: Overall the program was good, but would have been better with additional avenues for feedback after a release was sent out. Everything else was fairly smooth and easy to use.
author: Christopher M.
pros: Functionality and layout was good, ease of use and customer support were also helpful.
cons: Feedback on the releases sent out. There was no real way to gauge whether the press release helped outreach or sales numbers.

review_title: PR Underground is our go-to PR solution
description: I needed to get a PR out very quickly and the PR Underground team came through for me!
author: Don D.
pros: The online portal works well overall, and the customer service is excellent!
cons: A few items in the portal need some tweaking, but as it noted it works well overall.

review_title: It's good for the budget minded company.
description: PR Underground is a good deal. If I want to get a press release live, it is the best/cheapest option. I've found about the same coverage as the more expensive companies.
author: Annie W.
pros: This software is very easy to use. It doesn't take much time to set up the newsroom with all of the company information that will be reused for all future releases. When you go back in to schedule a new release you just have to do a couple quick steps, a couple copy & pastes and it is done.
cons: The software itself I don't have any issues with.

description: I’ve used multiple services and I feel this is a pretty good one.
author: Tephanie D.
pros: Ease of use, customer service and Google indexing
cons: Creating the multiple newsrooms can be challenging for each client

author: Emily P.
pros: It's easy to input press releases, and keeps the format consistent.
cons: I've priced some for cheaper, but the commitment didn't fit our needs.

author: MK G.
pros: Great, inexpensive option for press release distribution. You can release on the wires for a fraction of the cost.
cons: No cons, big fan of PR Underground. Would definitely recommend.

review_title: Easy to use, very affordable PR distribution tool
author: Eric C.
pros: Really easy to get up and running. Love the affordable and flexible pricing structure.
cons: Support can be hit or miss since they're based on the West Coast, especially if you're an East Coast company trying to get a release out early in the morning.

description: We get the public attention we need when we need it.
author: Derek B.
pros: We do PR like the pro’s by using PR Underground. It’s the tool we use to jumpstart PR and the the attention of other media outlets. There is no downside to appearing in over 80 news outlets, including on major media brands. PR Underground is inexpensive, easy to use, and gets results. I hate sharing secrets like this but entrepreneurs have to stick together.
cons: Like I said “there is no downside.” Nothing else to say

review_title: Good option at a resonable price
description: Overall it has been a good experience and easy to get a digital release out.
author: Natalia G.
pros: It is easy to use and quick to add releases in a pinch. It is also a good price and option compared to some of the bigger names that don't provide many other perks.
cons: Categories not always fit our needs for industry.

author: Maciej F.
pros: The ease of use is definitely a plus. I think the overall user experience is great.
cons: I would love to see a more international component.

review_title: PR Underground puts my Press Release on Trusted High Authority Sites
description: Very happy with the service and will continue to you use them.
author: Mark M.
pros: Software is easy to use and works. You can add a picture. What I like most is that press release appear my strong news service sites.
cons: No dislikes with this software. I have nothing bad to say
